services.name: Fenrua public website and evidence interface
services.purpose: Publishes company information, service information, technical documentation, research, evidence records, status information, and bounded read-only observations.
services.supportBoundary: Public business enquiries are handled through the published contact channel; the public site has no self-service account or checkout.
services.knownLimitation: The public interface does not attest to live APIs, protected systems, private infrastructure, or client-specific environments.

services.name: Public research and evidence records
services.purpose: Publishes point-in-time research, technical, audit, and evidence artifacts with stated scope and limitations.
dependencies: Release-manifest generation when a release is built
services.supportBoundary: Artifacts are public only within their listed revision, validation method, evidence, and limitation; no private evidence channel is exposed here.
services.knownLimitation: Publication does not rerun underlying campaigns or provide universal certification or a guarantee.

services.name: Bounded read-only observations
services.purpose: Exposes bounded public Chain 978 and Chain N521 observation states and public verification metadata without transaction or private-mesh access.
services.supportBoundary: Only read-only public observation fields and verification metadata are exposed; no public RPC, administrative interface, private endpoint, or signing key is exposed.
services.knownLimitation: Observations do not prove contract safety, bytecode identity, reserve state, finality, deployment correctness, or chain availability; Chain N521 may remain awaiting independent evidence.

services.name: AI efficiency infrastructure technology services
services.purpose: Offers research, development, software, infrastructure access, hosting, integration, technical support, and evidence-aware workflows within the relevant service scope.
dependencies: Service subscription or client-specific business agreement
Applicable service description, price, scope, and terms
services.supportBoundary: The relevant service description, price, scope, and terms govern a service; browsing the public site does not form a paid agreement.
services.knownLimitation: The current public site does not expose self-service account creation or checkout and does not offer financial-return products.

services.name: Client-specific software and infrastructure work
services.purpose: Provides client-specific software, infrastructure access, hosting, integration, support, and related work where covered by an agreement, order, or statement of work.

targets: Applicable order or statement of work

dependencies: Defined service scope and operational terms
services.supportBoundary: Only the applicable agreement defines the client-specific service; no client data or delivery details are published in this catalogue.
services.knownLimitation: No standard public product, client portal, or public operational commitment is represented by this entry.
